title: How It Works – Real World & Compliance
description: Two-column text section: Real-World Environments on the left, Built to Support Compliance on the right.

realworldIntro.default: Goliath™ is fitted directly onto existing racking and is installed at ground-level impact zones.

realworldListIntro.default: You'll see it in places like:

realworldClosing.default: Once it is installed, it becomes a part of the upright that provides continuous protection without affecting daily operations.

complianceIntro.default: Goliath™ aligns with recognised UK standards:

complianceClosing.default: By reinforcing damaged uprights, our permanent upright repair helps maintain structural integrity and supports ongoing inspection requirements.
